accepted_features.title: Need this fix ASAP or im gonna fr stop using this app
accepted_features.body: why the hell doesn't this app have a dark mode my eyes hurt every single day from the BLINDING bright white screen, we need to have a dark mode...
accepted_features.summary: User requests dark mode feature to improve visual comfort
top_comments: Yeah can we please get this implementation please I need this desperately
Holy shit i've been asking for this for so long...
